findings.message: The element has no alt attribute, so it has no accessible name. Screen readers cannot describe the banner image, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add an alt attribute describing the image (e.g. alt="Items catalogue banner"), or alt="" if the image is purely decorative so assistive tech can skip it.

raw_text: [{"path":"frontend/src/Items.tsx","line":30,"severity":"high","message":"The element has no alt attribute, so it has no accessible name. Screen readers cannot describe the banner image, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).","suggestion":"Add an alt attribute describing the image (e.g. alt=\"Items catalogue banner\"), or alt=\"\" if the image is purely decorative so assistive tech can skip it."}]
